claims.claim: Telemetry/sensory reciprocity latency must distinguish real lane delay from reflective or viscous silence.
High-entropy pressure smoothing and stale windows can preserve silt/ghost pressure, so the system needs evidence separating smoothing from live pressure change.
evidence: capsules/spectral-bridge/src/ws.rs: pressure trend smoothing and silt/noise separation

claims.claim: Lowering PRESSURE_TREND_SMOOTHING_HIGH_ENTROPY_WINDOW from 20 to 15 would alter live pressure/report behavior.
A persistence-aware SensoryMsg flag could protect deliberate slowness from being treated as dead-zone failure, but it would change sensory protocol semantics.
